steps.t: The palantír is somewhere within Barad Tironn. You must find the palantír and steal it before Amarthiel can use it to learn the location of Narchuil.
The palantír is on its pedestal deep within Barad Tironn. Laerdan has given you the word: one of you must seize the palantír and carry it to Calenglad…
Calenglad is at the entrance to Barad Tironn. You must protect the carrier of the palantír and see it delivered to Calenglad at the entrance to Barad …
